description: Tim Roughgarden discusses an axiomatic approach to block rewards, focusing on incentive issues in blockchain protocols and the design of mechanisms to ensure user behavior aligns with intended outcomes. He emphasizes the importance of mechanism design in creating optimal blockchain protocols.
topic_summary: The talk covers the intersection of mechanism design and blockchain protocol design, exploring how to structure incentives for miners and the distribution of block rewards, particularly in the context of single block creation [t=225:47].
